title: ERCOT AS Prices CSV download
description:
⚠️ This dataset is deprecated in favor of [ERCOT MCPC DAM](https://www.gridstatus.io/datasets/ercot_mcpc_dam). 

The ercot_as_prices previously had just the DAM prices, but that was not indicated in the dataset id. Additionally, the schema of the new  dataset matches the other new AS dataset: [ercot_mcpc_sced](https://www.gridstatus.io/datasets/ercot_mcpc_sced) and [ercot_mcpc_real_time_15_min](https://www.gridstatus.io/datasets/ercot_mcpc_real_time_15_min)
____


Hourly prices for Ancillary Services as reported by ERCOT from the day-ahead market run. 

Currently, these ancillary services are: *ERCOT Contingency Reserve Servic*e (ECRS), *Non-Spinning Responsive Reserves* (NSPIN), *Regulation Down* (REGDN), *Regulation Up* (REGUP), and *Responsive Reserves* (RRS)
